content.en:
There should be Netherstone at the bottom of the river in the Lethe River Realm, and the children of the universe do not dare to enter the bottom of the river, if Ye Tian can enter the bottom of the river, it means that he can get a lot of Netherstone stones.

"Escape into the space first, go to the bottom of the river and have a look!"

Immediately, Ye Tian opened up the spatial talent and escaped into the space.

His body was hidden in the space, and he entered the space corresponding to the bottom of the river.

At the same time, Ye Tian opened the Eye of Void, pierced through the space, and swept the area at the bottom of the river.

Under Ye Tian's investigation, the situation at the bottom of this river was unobstructed.

Ye Tian kept searching, trying to find a Netherstone stone.

Suddenly.

A figure caught Ye Tian's attention.

It was an octopus-like creature swimming slowly at the bottom of the river.

"It's a necromantic creature!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Once, he had encountered a necromantic creature in the Graveyard World, and that was the only necromantic creature he had ever encountered.

Unexpectedly, there were also necromantic creatures in the Lethe Realm, and he encountered one so easily.

"Probe!"

Ye Tian's copying talent shrouded the other party, and he saw the talent of this necromantic creature clearly.

Talent Identification
Species: Eight-armed undead
Bloodline Talent: Radiant Moon

Strength Talents: Top

Necromantic Talent: Pseudo-Arcane (50%)

Strangling Talent: Top

Judging from the talent of this eight-armed undead beast, its talent is not very good, and it is definitely a very ordinary talent among emperor-level creatures.

However, for Ye Tian, it was definitely luck to be able to meet this eight-armed undead beast.

"Fifty percent of the pseudo-mystic-level necromancer talent is much higher than my necromantic talent, copy!"

Ye Tian instantly copied the necromantic talent of this eight-armed undead beast, and he was in a good mood immediately.

Then Ye Tian left this piece of river and opened up a small cave not far away.

Immediately, he began to fuse the necromantic talent in the small cave mansion.

Ten minutes passed, and Ye Tian's necromantic talent was raised to the level of fifty percent pseudo-mysteries.

In this way, the effect of Ye Tian's necromantic talent absorbing qi was much, much stronger than before.

It can even be said that Ye Tian doesn't need a jade pendant, he can survive in the Lethe River Realm for a long time.

Then, Ye Tian returned to the river and continued to escape into the space to find the Netherstone Stone.

To Ye Tian's surprise, he found several more necromantic creatures, three of which had top-level necromantic talents, and the other necromantic creature actually possessed forty percent of pseudo-mystery-level necromantic talents.

So one day, he copied the forty percent pseudo-mystery-level necromantic talent, and after copying and fusing it, Ye Tian's necromantic talent was upgraded to seventy percent of the pseudo-arcane level.

The higher the level of the necromantic talent, the happier Ye Tian naturally was.

Originally, Ye Tian didn't have much confidence in whether he could practice the second layer of the Longevity Normalization Technique.

Now, as the level of necromantic talent continues to increase, Ye Tian's confidence is naturally getting stronger and stronger.

Day 2.

Ye Tian finally found a Netherstone stone.

Somewhere at the bottom of the river.

A basketball-sized stone is embedded in the silt, and the stone has a dark metal exterior.

Ye Tian's divine sense wanted to penetrate into the metal, but he was blocked by the metal, and the treasure hunting talent did not find out where the stone was.

According to Ye Tian's judgment, this metal must be Nether Iron, and there is a Nether Stone in the Nether Iron.

"Take this stone first!"

Ye Tian opened the necromantic talent, and immediately reached out of the space with one hand and grabbed the Nether Iron.

Bang!!!

Countless necromantic qi poured into Ye Tian's arm.

At this time, the power of that jade pendant could not stop the necromantic qi.

Since Ye Tian had opened the necromancy talent, and his arm had only been placed at the bottom of the river for a short time, he had retreated into the space in time, so there was nothing wrong.

space.

Ye Tian first put this piece of Netherworld Iron into the Void Mina Realm with him, and then took a closer look at his right hand.

At this time, his right hand had been corroded a little, but thanks to the combined effect of various recovery talents, he quickly recovered.

"What a strong necromantic talent, fortunately, my necromantic talent has been raised to the seventh level to become a pseudo-mystic, otherwise, with the level of my previous top-level necromantic talent, I'm afraid I would have been seriously injured now!"

Ye Tian had to admit that he had underestimated the concentration and quality of the necromantic qi in the river before.

"It seems that if you want to cultivate the second layer of the Immortal Unification Technique, you must raise the Necromancy Talent to the Mystery Level, otherwise, even if I have the Chaos Body, plus the powerful body of the Universe Child, I won't be able to withstand it!" Ye Tian thought in his heart.

This river is placed in the Lethe River boundary, and it is just an ordinary river.

Ye Tian had already explored almost all of this river, so he was going to go to the rivers in other regions to explore again.

This time, his purpose is not only to find Nether Stone, but also to find other necromantic creatures and copy their necromantic talents.

Wow!

Ye Tian flew away, constantly looking for the river.

Half a day later.

Ye Tian saw a long river that was far wider and more majestic than before, and the necromantic qi of this long river was also slightly stronger than before.

"It's a good river, and you may be able to find a lot of Nether Stones and Necromantic creatures. "

Ye Tian thought to himself, so he escaped into the space and entered the bottom of the river.

Next, Ye Tian began to investigate.

Sure enough, just ten minutes later, Ye Tian found a necromantic creature.

Talent Identification
Species: Death crocodile
Bloodline Talent: Dawn Level

Strength Talents: Top

Defense Talents: Top

Necromantic Talent: Pseudo-Arcane (50%)

......

"Found it!"

Ye Tian's mood was quite excited.

The necromantic talent of this Death Giant Crocodile is as high as fifty percent of the pseudo-Arcane level, once the necromantic talent of this Death Giant Crocodile is copied and fused, today's Necromantic Talent will definitely be able to be upgraded to the Arcant level.

After Ye Tian successfully copied, he left the river and found a place to start fusing the fifty percent pseudo-mystery-level necromantic talent.

Half an hour later, Ye Tian's necromantic talent finally transformed.

【Necromantic Talent: Arcane Level】

It can be said that before entering the Lethe Realm, Ye Tian did not expect that his necromantic talent could be upgraded to the Arcane level.

It was definitely a big surprise.

In the following days, Ye Tian did not copy the necromantic talent.

His main purpose now is to find the Nether Stone.

In the blink of an eye, a month passed, and Ye Tian explored a total of three rivers, almost exploring the three rivers inch by inch, and finally found 13 pieces of Nether Iron.

"13 Nether Iron, at least 10 Nether Stones in it!"

Ye Tian estimated.

So on this day, Ye Tian cut these netherworld iron pieces one by one.

Click!!!

Pieces of Netherworld Iron were violently opened by Ye Tian.

After the first Nether Iron opened, a gray square stone appeared.

The stone is not big, only the size of a thumb.

And Ye Tian recognized it at a glance, this stone was the Netherworld Stone.

The first Nether Stone is here!

Immediately, Ye Tian opened all the other Nether Iron, and the result was lucky, only one Nether Iron did not have a Nether Stone, and the other Nether Iron contained a Nether Stone.

This is that Ye Tian already has 12 Nether Stones, which is equivalent to completing the task.

Once he returned, he would be able to enter the high-level Sword Dao Origin Cultivation Realm for cultivation.

"I've completed my mission, I don't need to look for the Nether Stone, it's time to cultivate the second layer of the Immortal Normalization Technique. "

The cultivation difficulty of the second layer of the Immortal Normalization Technique was far more difficult than that of the first layer of the Immortal Normalization Technique, so the time consumed was far more than the time required for the first layer of the Immortal Normalization Technique.

Subsequently, according to Ye Tian's judgment, he found that it was estimated that it would be difficult to cultivate the second layer of the Immortal Normalization Technique on land, because the concentration and quality of the Necromantic Qi were slightly worse.

Therefore, Ye Tian had to enter these rivers to cultivate, and the best cultivation environment was the bottom of the river.

It is conceivable that if Ye Tian hadn't raised his necromantic talent to the arcane level before, he probably wouldn't have been able to practice the second level of the Immortal Unification Technique at all.

Wow!

Ye Tian jumped into a river in the Lethe River Realm, and the moment he jumped in, countless necromantic qi poured into his body.

Under the impact of so many necromantic qi, the piece of jade pendant that originally protected Ye Tian's body could not withstand it, and cracks began to appear one after another.

Immediately, Ye Tian directly included this piece of jade pendant in the Void Mina Realm, lest this piece of jade pendant be completely scrapped, which would undoubtedly be a waste of a treasure.

Without the protection of the jade pendant, Ye Tian was able to bear the impact of these necromantic qi head-on.

In an instant, Ye Tian's body began to pass away.

"Necromantic talent!"

"Immortal talent!"

"Gift of Life!"

"Healing Talent!"

"Bloodthirsty Talent!"

Ye Tian opened all the talents of one door and restored his physical body that had been eroded by the necromantic qi.

At the same time, Ye Tian also divided a small part of his mind, controlling his physical body, and running the Chaos Refining Body Technique.

Under the operation of the Chaos Body Refining Technique, a lot of necromantic qi was transformed by the Chaos Body and the Chaos Body Refining Technique.

With the assistance of many talents and means, Ye Tian finally withstood the erosion of the necromantic qi.

"You can cultivate the second layer of the Immortal Normalization Technique!"

Ye Tian was looking forward to it.
